mapper.select: SELECT u.uuid AS uid, u.username, u.avatar, u.nickname, pc.content AS last_content, pc.gmt_create AS last_time, COALESCE(un.unread_count, 0) AS unread_count FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{uid} THEN recipient_id ELSE sender_id END AS contact_uid, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM private_chat WHERE sender_id = #{uid} OR recipient_id = #{uid} GROUP BY contact_uid ) latest INNER JOIN private_chat pc ON pc.id = latest.max_id INNER JOIN user_info u ON u.uuid = latest.contact_uid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sender_id, COUNT(1) AS unread_count FROM private_chat WHERE recipient_id = #{uid} AND state = 0 GROUP BY sender_id ) un ON un.sender_id = latest.contact_uid ORDER BY pc.gmt_create DESC

SELECT pc.id, pc.sender_id, pc.content, pc.state, pc.gmt_create, u.username, u.avatar, u.nickname FROM private_chat pc INNER JOIN user_info u ON u.uuid = pc.sender_id WHERE (pc.sender_id = #{uid} AND pc.recipient_id = #{contactUid}) OR (pc.sender_id = #{contactUid} AND pc.recipient_id = #{uid}) ORDER BY pc.id DESC
